description: CompositionDark brown wind cheater made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves with stud detailing on the cuffs, stylized mandarin collar, buttoned placket on the front, zippered pocket on the upper right chest, flap pocket over the upper left chest, patch pockets with buttoned flaps on either sides of the placket and has quilted lining FittingComfortWash careDo not washDo not bleach, tumble dry or wringIron on lowDry cleanableThe patch pockets, metal stud, buttons and stylized mandarin collar add smooth styling to this dark brown jacket from turtle. The quilted lining makes sure that you stay insulated. Part of the proceeds from the sale of this product go towards the Save Turtle project in collaboration with WWF and Wildlife Society of Orissa makeing it an environment friendly choice. Team this with shirts or t-shirts and jeans.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and chest 39"
